channel.title: Cutefish on Reion's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Cutefish on Reion's Blog

item.title: A Notification Design Idea
item.description: I recently saw the new front-screen design on the iPhone 14 pro series, which Apple calls “Dynamic island”, and that’s where I got the idea.

item.title: Cutefish Menu Bar Chameleon
item.description: macOS Big Sur introduced a new top menu bar behavior: the menu bar background color adapts to the desktop wallpaper, so it feels more integrated than before.
